name: fun
description: Anti-productivity skills that make the model refuse its defaults: estrange, compete, divine, and play instead of summarize and agree

interface.shortDescription: Anti-productivity skills: estrange, compete, divine, and play
interface.longDescription: Dex Fun makes the model refuse its assistant defaults and do something you could not do without it: semantic fixed points, year-locked oracles, reskinned feeds, camera narration, talking to your own clone, evolutionary game arenas, adversarial belief stress-tests, honest apophenia from your own collection, friendship cartography, city-scale ARGs, invented games, and one-time voice reconstructions. Output is surprise, not productivity.
